message:
chore: Update .gitignore for better env protection

- Add dedicated environment variables section
- Protect .env, .env.local, .env*.local
- Add test-output/ to ignore list
- Improve organization of ignore patterns

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,8 @@
+# Environment variables
+.env
+.env.local
+.env*.local
+
 # Logs
 logs
 *.log
@@ -12,6 +17,9 @@ dist
 dist-ssr
 *.local
 
+# Test output
+test-output/
+
 # Editor directories and files
 .vscode/*
 !.vscode/extensions.json
